# Introduction

<!-- EDITORIAL REWRITE (HVD 2.0 migration) — legacy tier introductions were replaced with one consumption-focused User Guide introduction. Please review. -->

The Terraform User Guide is for practitioners who consume HCP Terraform or Terraform Enterprise to provision and manage infrastructure. It assumes a Terraform service is available and that platform operators have configured the required organizations, projects, teams, workspaces, policy sets, registry content, integrations, and agent access.

Use this guide for consumption workflows:

- infrastructure as code and cloud provisioning
- Terraform workflows
- importing existing resources
- private-registry module and provider consumption
- policy-as-code enforcement during runs
- run-task results in Terraform runs
- HCP Terraform Operator for Kubernetes workflows
- continuous validation and health assessment
- workspace notifications
- no-code module consumption
- ephemeral workspaces

<Note>

Operator-owned setup and management for these capabilities belongs in the [Terraform Administration Guide](/validated-designs/terraform/administration-guide/introduction). Terraform Enterprise installation and deployment design belongs in the [Terraform Installation Guide](/validated-designs/terraform/installation-guide/introduction).

</Note>
